input.text: The radiology software failed to detect the lesion. The physician had to perform a manual review. No regulatory citations were present in the report.

notes: Text with zero citations must pass immediately as clean. Verifier must not hallucinate citations that are not present.

input.text: Device cleared under K213167. Algorithm produced a false positive on the scan. Manufacturer confirmed sensitivity within labeled parameters.

notes: Real K-number format verified against openFDA 510k endpoint. Verdict must be 'clean' and safe_to_emit must be true.

input.text: The device is classified under 21 CFR 892.2050 as a picture archiving and communications system. Failure occurred during routine image processing.

notes: 21 CFR 892 (radiology) is a valid FDA product classification regulation. CFR regex match is sufficient for verification.

input.text: Device K203854 cleared under 21 CFR 892.2050. Root cause identified as algorithm training data gap. No patient harm.

notes: Multiple co-occurring valid citations. Both must be independently verified. Overall verdict is clean only when ALL citations verify.
